name: screen-aware
description: Give Codex visual and audio context from local Screen-Aware desktop captures.

interface.shortDescription: Use live desktop context inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Screen-Aware connects Codex to the local Screen-Aware MCP server so agents can inspect live or historical desktop capture context, including visual evidence, transcripts, annotations, and capture status.
defaultPrompt: Use Screen-Aware live while I show a bug
